title: Cannot access container port from external machine (Windows)
body:
### Issue Description

I cannot access my container port from network outside host machine.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. podman run --rm --name myweb -p 8080:80 docker.io/nginx
2. From different PC of the same network of the host machine, execute curl. Example for host 192.168.122.13: curl  http://192.168.122.13:8080/



### Describe the results you received

Failed to connect to target. Connection refused.

### Describe the results you expected

HTTP status 200 followed by a simple HTML page.

### Additional information

comments.body: WSL does not allow external access by default, see https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17030
